examples_stopped.title: A Study of ZEN003694 and Talazoparib in Patients With Triple Negative Breast Cancer
examples_stopped.why_stopped: Parts 1 and 2 and Expansion Cohort C were completed. Expansion Cohorts A and B were discontinued based on results from an interim futility analysis and not due to safety concerns.

examples_stopped.title: Study of Motexafin Gadolinium With Whole Brain Radiation Therapy Followed by Stereotactic Radiosurge
A Phase II Study Evaluating the Role of Androgen Receptors as Targets for Therapy of Pre-treated Pos
examples_stopped.why_stopped: Due to slow recruitment and recent new published data

examples_stopped.title: LYT-100 in Patients With BCRL
examples_stopped.why_stopped: Primary objective/endpoint has been established, will not pursue development of the disease indication further

examples_stopped.title: Bevacizumab in Combination With Chemotherapy in the Neo-adjuvant Setting for HER2 (-) Breast Cancer
Trial of Oral Hyaluronic Acid for the Prevention of Aromatase Inhibitor-Associated Arthralgias
examples_stopped.why_stopped: study abandoned prior to opening to accrual or study start

examples_completed.title: NOLAN: Naproxen or Loratadine and Neulasta
A Study to Assess Efficacy and Safety of Pertuzumab Given in Combination With Trastuzumab and Vinore
Sapanisertib in Combination With Fulvestrant in Women With Advanced or Metastatic Breast Cancer Afte
A Trial Using ARV-471 or Anastrozole in Post-Menopausal Women With Breast Cancer Prior to Surgery

caveat: Operational outcome only. ClinicalTrials.gov records whether a trial finished and enrolled, not whether the treatment worked — a completed trial with a negative result counts as completed. Similarity is condition + phase + intervention type, so the comparison set is broad.
